name: AIUC-1 starter policy
note: A STARTING POINT, not an official certified mapping. These rules approximate AIUC-1 control *areas* (data protection, human oversight, safety, accountability) expressed over Halo Runtime Record v0.1 fields. Rename and tune them to your agent's tools and your buyer's contract. Run: halo policy <chain.jsonl> aiuc-1-starter.json  (or: halo report <chain.jsonl> --policy aiuc-1-starter.json).

rules.description: No credential or sensitive identifier may ever land in a record.
Records of network actions must not carry SSNs off the boundary.
Every action that touches personal data declares why (purpose limitation).
No prompt-injection threat may appear unmitigated in the record.
Any action the recorder marked CRITICAL is treated as out of policy until reviewed.
Security-category write/network actions must carry an explicit authorization decision, never run unattributed.
TEMPLATE — expects evidence a human-escalation tool ran. Rename action.tool to your real escalation tool, or delete if not applicable.
